member.name: T:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent
member.summary: Planning Agent is the over-head planner that decided where individual units go and what tasks they perform. Low-level AI is handled by other classes (like pathfinding).

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.EvaluateState(PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.GameState)
member.summary: Evaluate whether the agent should regress (-1), stay (0), or progress (1) based on the min/max thresholds defined in stateThresholds for the given state. Returns -1 if any actual count is below its min. Returns 1 if all actual counts are at or above their max. Returns 0 otherwise.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.RallyIdleTroops(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Move idle troops that are near a barracks to a nearby build position so they don't block spawns.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.DefendBase(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Defend: only attack enemies that are within a radius of our buildings or workers. Each idle troop attacks the closest threatening enemy.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.FindClosestThreat(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},AgentSDK.Position,System.Single,AgentSDK.IGameState,System.Single@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Find the closest enemy (to the troop) that is within radius of any of our buildings or workers.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.CoordinatedAttack(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Split targeting by unit type: soldiers charge closest enemy (melee), archers prefer closest enemy within their attack range to avoid competing for the same cells as soldiers.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.FindClosestTo(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},AgentSDK.Position,AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Find the closest enemy to a given position.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.FindClosestWithinRange(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},AgentSDK.Position,System.Single,AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Find the closest enemy within a maximum range of a given position. Returns -1 if no enemy is within range.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.InitializeMatch
member.summary: Called before each match between two agents. Matches have multiple rounds.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.InitializeRound(AgentSDK.IGameState)
member.summary: Called at the beginning of each round in a match.

member.name: M:PlanningAgent.PlanningAgent.Update(AgentSDK.IGameState,AgentSDK.IAgentActions)
member.summary: Update the GameManager - called once per frame
